                        <div class="social-btn-text">WhatsApp</div>
                    </a>

                    <a href="https://www.youtube.com/@isacmodstv" target="_blank" class="social-btn youtube">
                        <div class="social-btn-icon">▶️</div>
                        <div class="social-btn-text">Isac Mods</div>
                    </a>

                    <a href="https://www.youtube.com/@bruxomodzofc" target="_blank" class="social-btn youtube">
                        <div class="social-btn-icon">▶️</div>
                        <div class="social-btn-text">Bruxo Modz</div>
                    </a>

                    <a href="https://t.me/bruxomodz" target="_blank" class="social-btn telegram">
                        <div class="social-btn-icon">✈️</div>
                        <div class="social-btn-text">Telegram</div>
                    </a>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="alert">
                <b>⚠️ AVISO:</b> Esta é a versão gratuita do Isac Menu e pode não funcionar em todos os dispositivos. Para uma versão completa com suporte e compatibilidade garantida, adquira o Isac Menu VIP em nossa loja.
            </div>

            <div class="card">
                <h2>O que você precisa?</h2>
                <p>Selecione uma opção para continuar</p>

                <div class="options">
                    <div class="option" onclick="abrirPagina2()">
                        <h3>📥 Instalar Isac Menu</h3>
                        <span>Download + Tutorial de instalação completo</span>
                    </div>

                    <div class="option">
                        <h3>🔧 Resolver Erros</h3>
                        <span>Resolva erros comuns de forma rápida e fácil</span>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <footer>
                ISAC MODS TV © 2025 - Todos os direitos reservados<br><br>
                Isac Menu FREE - Versão gratuita com recursos limitados<br><br>
                Para suporte técnico e recursos completos, adquira a versão VIP em:<br>
                <a href="https://bruxomodzoficial.github.io/site-downloads/">https://bruxomodzoficial.github.io/site-downloads/</a>
            </footer>
        </div>

        <!-- PÁGINA 2 -->
        <div id="pagina2">
            <div class="logo">ISAC</div>
            <h1 class="title">ISAC MENU FREE</h1>
            <p class="subtitle">Versão gratuita com funcionalidades básicas. Suporte limitado.</p>

            <div class="alert">
                <b>⚠️ AVISO:</b> Esta é a versão gratuita do Isac Menu e pode não funcionar em todos os dispositivos. Para uma versão completa com suporte e compatibilidade garantida, adquira o Isac Menu VIP em nossa loja.
            </div>

            <button class="back" onclick="voltar()">← Voltar à Seleção</button>

            <div class="topButtons">
                <button class="btn install">📥 INSTALAÇÃO</button>
                <button class="btn fix">🔧 RESOLVER ERROS</button>
            </div>

            <div class="tutorialCard">
                <h2>SELECIONE O TUTORIAL DE INSTALAÇÃO</h2>
                <p>Escolha um dos métodos abaixo. Se um não funcionar, tente o outro:</p>

                <div class="tutorials-grid">
                    <div class="tutorial" onclick="abrirTutorial(1)">
                        <h3>🎯 TUTORIAL 1</h3>
                        <p>📥 Instalar Isac Menu Rio Rise</p>
                    </div>

                    <div class="tutorial" onclick="abrirTutorial(2)">
                        <h3>🎯 TUTORIAL 2</h3>

                    </div>

                    <div class="tutorial" onclick="abrirTutorial(3)">
                        <h3>🎯 TUTORIAL 3</h3>
                        <p>📥 Instalar Isac Menu Free Fire</p>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="tip">
                    💡 <b>Dica:</b> Se um tutorial não funcionar no seu dispositivo, é só tentar o outro método. Todos levam ao mesmo resultado!
                </div>

                <div id="downloadArea1" class="downloadArea">
                    <h2 style="color:#00d4ff; margin-top:30px;">📥 DOWNLOAD - TUTORIAL 1 (RIO RISE)</h2>
                    <p>Baixe o arquivo do Isac Menu para o Tutorial 1:</p>

                    <div class="downloadButtons">
                        <button class="downloadBtn" onclick="handleDownload(event, 'https://riorise.com/download/isacmenu')">
                            ⬇️ BAIXAR ISAC MENU
                        </button>
                        <button class="downloadBtn" onclick="handleDownload(event, 'https://riorise.com/pt')">

                    <div class="video">

                        <p>Assista o passo a passo completo para instalar o Isac Menu com Rio Rise:</p>
                        <iframe src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/aK14-gEwsXo"></iframe>
                    </div>

                    <div class="features">
                        <div class="feature">

                            <p>Proteção limitada para uso seguro</p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="feature">

                        <div class="feature">

                            <p>Sem suporte técnico direto</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div id="downloadArea2" class="downloadArea">
                    <h2 style="color:#00d4ff; margin-top:30px;">📥 DOWNLOAD - TUTORIAL 2 (LIVE RUSSIA)</h2>
                    <p>Baixe o arquivo do Isac Menu para o Tutorial 2:</p>

                    <div class="downloadButtons">
                        <button class="downloadBtn" onclick="handleDownload(event, 'https://mega.nz/file/QFETkZxY#DJTddUOsodxmQ9ev3xgXHqUiQK9vqpnRhPTK908lZo4')">
                            ⬇️ BAIXAR MOD LIVE RUSSIA
                        </button>
                        <button class="downloadBtn" onclick="handleDownload(event, 'https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.liverussia.game.googleplay')">

                        </button>

                    <div class="note">
                        <b>📌 Nota Importante:</b> Este método é otimizado para conexões de alta velocidade. Certifique-se de ter uma boa conexão de internet.
                    </div>

                    <div class="video">
                        <h2>🎬 VÍDEO TUTORIAL 2 - LIVE RUSSIA</h2>
                        <p>Assista o passo a passo completo para instalar o Isac Menu com Live Russia:</p>
                        <iframe src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/H-csPSLcptA"></iframe>
                    </div>

                    <div class="features">
                        <div class="feature">
                            <h3>⚡ Velocidade Ultra</h3>
                            <p>Download e instalação rápida</p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="feature">
                            <h3>🌍 Servidor Global</h3>

                <div id="downloadArea3" class="downloadArea">
                    <h2 style="color:#00d4ff; margin-top:30px;">📥 DOWNLOAD - TUTORIAL 3 (FREE FIRE)</h2>
                    <p>Baixe o arquivo do Isac Menu para o Tutorial 3:</p>

                    <div class="downloadButtons">
                        <button class="downloadBtn" onclick="handleDownload(event, 'https://mega.nz/file/QFETkZxY#DJTddUOsodxmQ9ev3xgXHqUiQK9vqpnRhPTK908lZo4')">
                            ⬇️ BAIXAR ISAC MENU FREE FIRE
                        </button>
                        <button class="downloadBtn" onclick="handleDownload(event, 'https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.dts.freefireth')">

                        </button>

                        <p>Assista o passo a passo completo para instalar o Isac Menu no Free Fire:</p>

                    <div class="features">

                            <p>Funciona perfeitamente no jogo</p>

    </div>

    <audio id="radioAudio" crossorigin="anonymous"></audio>

    <script>
        // RELÓGIO EM TEMPO REAL
        function updateClock() {
            const now = new Date();
            
            const hours = String(now.getHours()).padStart(2, '0');
            const minutes = String(now.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');
            const seconds = String(now.getSeconds()).padStart(2, '0');
            const timeString = `${hours}:${minutes}:${seconds}`;
            
            const days = ['Domingo', 'Segunda', 'Terça', 'Quarta', 'Quinta', 'Sexta', 'Sábado'];
            const months = ['Jan', 'Fev', 'Mar', 'Abr', 'Mai', 'Jun', 'Jul', 'Ago', 'Set', 'Out', 'Nov', 'Dez'];
            const dayName = days[now.getDay()];
            const date = now.getDate();
            const month = months[now.getMonth()];
            const year = now.getFullYear();
            const dateString = `${dayName}, ${date} de ${month} de ${year}`;
            
            document.getElementById('clockDisplay').textContent = timeString;
            document.getElementById('clockDate').textContent = dateString;
        }

        updateClock();
        setInterval(updateClock, 1000);

        // EFEITO DE CLICK
        function createClickEffect(event) {
            const x = event.clientX;
            const y = event.clientY;

            const clickEffect = document.createElement('div');
            clickEffect.className = 'click-effect';
            clickEffect.style.left = x + 'px';
            clickEffect.style.top = y + 'px';

            const ripple = document.createElement('div');
            ripple.className = 'click-ripple';
            ripple.style.left = '-50px';
            ripple.style.top = '-50px';
            clickEffect.appendChild(ripple);

            const text = document.createElement('div');
            text.className = 'click-text';
            text.textContent = '✓ CLICK';
            text.style.left = '-30px';
            text.style.top = '-15px';
            clickEffect.appendChild(text);

            document.body.appendChild(clickEffect);

            setTimeout(() => {
                clickEffect.remove();
            }, 800);
        }

        function handleDownload(event, url) {
            createClickEffect(event);
            window.open(url);
        }

        let isPlaying = false;
        const radioAudio = document.getElementById('radioAudio');
        const radioBtn = document.getElementById('radioBtn');
        const radioPlayer = document.getElementById('radioPlayer');
        const playPauseBtn = document.getElementById('playPauseBtn');
        const statusText = document.getElementById('statusText');
        const soundWaves = document.getElementById('soundWaves');

        const radioURL = 'https://stream.zeno.fm/x9ko0jn9mzauv';

        function toggleRadio() {
            if (!radioPlayer.classList.contains('active')) {
                radioPlayer.classList.add('active');
                radioBtn.classList.add('playing');
                radioBtn.textContent = '⏸️ PARANDO...';
                playRadio();
            } else {
                stopRadio();
            }
        }

        function playRadio() {
            radioAudio.src = radioURL;
            radioAudio.play().catch(err => {
                statusText.textContent = '❌ Erro ao conectar à rádio';
                console.log('Erro:', err);
            });
            isPlaying = true;
            playPauseBtn.textContent = '⏸️';
            statusText.textContent = '▶️ Reproduzindo...';
            soundWaves.style.opacity = '1';
        }

        function stopRadio() {
            radioAudio.pause();
            radioAudio.src = '';
            isPlaying = false;
            radioPlayer.classList.remove('active');
            radioBtn.classList.remove('playing');
            radioBtn.textContent = '▶️ ACESSAR RÁDIO';
            playPauseBtn.textContent = '▶️';
            statusText.textContent = '⏹️ Parado';
            soundWaves.style.opacity = '0.5';
        }

        function togglePlayPause() {
            if (isPlaying) {
                radioAudio.pause();
                isPlaying = false;
                playPauseBtn.textContent = '▶️';
                statusText.textContent = '⏸️ Pausado';
                soundWaves.style.opacity = '0.5';
            } else {
                radioAudio.play();
                isPlaying = true;
                playPauseBtn.textContent = '⏸️';
                statusText.textContent = '▶️ Reproduzindo...';
                soundWaves.style.opacity = '1';
            }
        }

        function changeVolume(value) {
            radioAudio.volume = value / 100;
        }

        function nextTrack() {
            statusText.textContent = '⏭️ Próxima música...';
            setTimeout(() => {
                statusText.textContent = '▶️ Reproduzindo...';
            }, 1000);
        }

        function previousTrack() {
            statusText.textContent = '⏮️ Música anterior...';
            setTimeout(() => {
                statusText.textContent = '▶️ Reproduzindo...';
            }, 1000);
        }

        function abrirPagina2() {
            document.getElementById("pagina1").style.display = "none";
            document.getElementById("pagina2").classList.add("active");
            window.scrollTo(0, 0);
        }

        function voltar() {
            document.getElementById("pagina2").classList.remove("active");
            document.getElementById("pagina1").style.display = "block";
            
            document.getElementById("downloadArea1").classList.remove("active");
            document.getElementById("downloadArea2").classList.remove("active");
            document.getElementById("downloadArea3").classList.remove("active");
            
            window.scrollTo(0, 0);
        }

        function abrirTutorial(numero) {
            document.getElementById("downloadArea1").classList.remove("active");
            document.getElementById("downloadArea2").classList.remove("active");
            document.getElementById("downloadArea3").classList.remove("active");
            
            document.getElementById("downloadArea" + numero).classList.add("active");
            document.getElementById("downloadArea" + numero).scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });
        }
    </script>
</body>
</html>

✅ Removido:

  • ❌ Seção de DOWNLOADS TOTAL
  • ❌ Contador de downloads
  • ❌ Barra de progresso

✅ Mantido:

  • ✅ Relógio em tempo real
  • ✅ Rádio Noltosfera
  • ✅ Redes sociais
  • ✅ Tutoriais
  • ✅ Efeito de CLICK
  • ✅ Design bonito

Copie tudo e teste! 🚀

DOWLODS TOTAL REMOVE

Perfeito! Vou adicionar um relógio de tempo real BONITO! Aqui está o código atualizado:

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Isac Menu Free - Download & Tutorial</title>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Outfit:wght@300;400;600;700;800;900&family=Space+Mono:wght@400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        body {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0f0f1e 0%, #1a0f2e 25%, #2d1b4e 50%, #1a0f2e 75%, #0f0f1e 100%);
            background-attachment: fixed;
            color: white;
            font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif;
            min-height: 100vh;
            overflow-x: hidden;
            position: relative;
        }

        body::before {
            content: '';
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            background: radial-gradient(circle at 20% 50%, rgba(255, 100, 200, 0.1) 0%, transparent 50%),
                        radial-gradient(circle at 80% 80%, rgba(100, 200, 255, 0.1) 0%, transparent 50%);
            pointer-events: none;
            z-index: 0;
        }

        .container {
            width: 90%;
            max-width: 1000px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            padding: 60px 20px;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
        }

        @keyframes fadeIn {
            from {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: translateY(30px);
            }
            to {
                opacity: 1;
                transform: translateY(0);
            }
        }

        @keyframes slideInLeft {
            from {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: translateX(-40px);
            }
            to {
                opacity: 1;
                transform: translateX(0);
            }
        }

        @keyframes glow {
            0%, 100% {
                box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(255, 100, 200, 0.3), 0 0 40px rgba(100, 200, 255, 0.2);
            }
            50% {
                box-shadow: 0 0 40px rgba(255, 100, 200, 0.5), 0 0 60px rgba(100, 200, 255, 0.3);
            }
        }

        @keyframes pulse {
            0%, 100% {
                transform: scale(1);
            }
            50% {
                transform: scale(1.05);
            }
        }

        @keyframes soundWave {
            0%, 100% {
                height: 5px;
            }
            50% {
                height: 20px;
            }
        }

        @keyframes slideDown {
            from {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: translateY(-20px);
            }
            to {
                opacity: 1;
                transform: translateY(0);
            }
        }

        @keyframes float {
            0%, 100% {
                transform: translateY(0px);
            }
            50% {
                transform: translateY(-10px);
            }
        }

        @keyframes clickRipple {
            0% {
                width: 0;
                height: 0;
                opacity: 1;
            }
            100% {
                width: 100px;
                height: 100px;
                opacity: 0;
            }
        }

        @keyframes clickPulse {
            0% {
                transform: scale(1);
                opacity: 1;
            }
            100% {
                transform: scale(1.5);
                opacity: 0;
            }
        }

        @keyframes clockTick {
            0%, 100% {
                transform: scale(1);
            }
            50% {
                transform: scale(1.02);
            }
        }

        /* EFEITO DE CLICK */
        .click-effect {
            position: fixed;
            pointer-events: none;
            z-index: 9999;
        }

        .click-ripple {
            position: absolute;
            border: 2px solid #00d4ff;
            border-radius: 50%;
            animation: clickRipple 0.6s ease-out forwards;
        }

        .click-text {
            position: absolute;
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: 900;
            color: #00d4ff;
            text-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.8);
            animation: clickPulse 0.8s ease-out forwards;
            pointer-events: none;
        }

        /* RELÓGIO */
        .clock-container {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.1), rgba(100, 100, 255, 0.1));
            border: 2px solid rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.3);
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 30px;
            margin-bottom: 40px;
            text-align: center;
            animation: fadeIn 1s ease-out;
            backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .clock-container::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: -50%;
            right: -50%;
            width: 200px;
            height: 200px;
            background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.2) 0%, transparent 70%);
            border-radius: 50%;
        }

        .clock-title {
            color: #00d4ff;
            font-size: 14px;
            margin-bottom: 15px;
            font-weight: 700;
            letter-spacing: 2px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
        }

        .clock-display {
            font-size: 48px;
            font-weight: 900;
            color: #00d4ff;
            font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            animation: clockTick 1s ease-in-out infinite;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
            text-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.6);
        }

        .clock-date {
            color: #b0a0c0;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: 500;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
        }

        .logo {
            width: 140px;
            height: 140px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            margin: 0 auto 40px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-size: 64px;
            font-weight: 900;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff64c8, #6400ff, #00d4ff);
            border: 3px solid #ff64c8;
            box-shadow: 0 0 40px rgba(255, 100, 200, 0.6), 0 0 80px rgba(100, 0, 255, 0.3);
            animation: glow 3s ease-in-out infinite, float 3s ease-in-out infinite;
            position: relative;
        }

        .logo::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            inset: -5px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff64c8, #6400ff, #00d4ff);
            opacity: 0.3;
            filter: blur(10px);
            z-index: -1;
        }

        .title {
            font-size: 48px;
            font-weight: 900;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff64c8, #00d4ff);
            -webkit-background-clip: text;
            -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
            background-clip: text;
            margin-bottom: 15px;
            text-align: center;
            animation: fadeIn 0.8s ease-out;
            letter-spacing: -1px;
        }

        .subtitle {
            color: #b0a0c0;
            margin-bottom: 40px;
            text-align: center;
            font-size: 16px;
            font-weight: 300;
            animation: fadeIn 1s ease-out;
            letter-spacing: 0.5px;
        }

        .download-counter {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255, 100, 200, 0.1), rgba(100, 200, 255, 0.1));
            border: 2px solid rgba(255, 100, 200, 0.3);
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 40px;
            margin-bottom: 40px;
            text-align: center;
            animation: fadeIn 1s ease-out;
            backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .download-counter::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: -50%;
            right: -50%;
            width: 200px;
            height: 200px;
            background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(255, 100, 200, 0.2) 0%, transparent 70%);
            border-radius: 50%;
        }

        .download-counter h3 {
            color: #ff64c8;
            font-size: 14px;
            margin-bottom: 15px;
            font-weight: 700;
            letter-spacing: 2px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
        }

        .counter-number {
            font-size: 56px;
            font-weight: 900;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff64c8, #00d4ff);
            -webkit-background-clip: text;
            -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
            background-clip: text;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            animation: pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
            font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
        }

        .counter-label {
            color: #a0a0b0;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: 500;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
        }

        .counter-bar {
            width: 100%;
            height: 8px;
            background: rgba(255, 100, 200, 0.1);
            border-radius: 10px;
            margin-top: 20px;
            overflow: hidden;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
        }

        .counter-fill {
            height: 100%;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #ff64c8, #00d4ff);
            border-radius: 10px;
            width: 75%;
            animation: fadeIn 2s ease-out;
            box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(255, 100, 200, 0.6);
        }

        .radio-section {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255, 140, 0, 0.08), rgba(255, 100, 50, 0.08));
            border: 2px solid rgba(255, 140, 0, 0.3);
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 50px;
            margin-bottom: 40px;
            text-align: center;
            animation: fadeIn 1s ease-out;
            backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .radio-section::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: -50%;
            left: -50%;
            width: 200px;
            height: 200px;
            background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(255, 140, 0, 0.2) 0%, transparent 70%);
            border-radius: 50%;
        }

        .radio-section h2 {
            color: #ffaa00;
            font-size: 32px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            gap: 15px;
            font-weight: 800;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
        }

        .sound-waves {
            display: flex;
            gap: 5px;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            height: 35px;
        }

        .wave {
            width: 5px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffaa00, #ff8800);
            border-radius: 3px;
            animation: soundWave 0.6s ease-in-out infinite;
        }

        .wave:nth-child(1) { animation-delay: 0s; }
        .wave:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.1s; }
        .wave:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.2s; }
        .wave:nth-child(4) { animation-delay: 0.3s; }
        .wave:nth-child(5) { animation-delay: 0.4s; }

        .radio-section p {
            color: #b0a0c0;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
            font-size: 16px;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
        }

        .radio-btn {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffaa00, #ff8800);
            border: none;
            padding: 16px 50px;
            border-radius: 50px;
            color: #0a0e27;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-weight: 800;
            font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            box-shadow: 0 8px 25px rgba(255, 140, 0, 0.4);
            font-size: 16px;
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 1px;
        }

        .radio-btn:hover {
            transform: translateY(-3px);
            box-shadow: 0 12px 35px rgba(255, 140, 0, 0.6);
        }

        .radio-btn:active {
            transform: scale(0.95);
        }

        .radio-btn.playing {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff6600, #ff4400);
            box-shadow: 0 0 40px rgba(255, 100, 0, 0.8);
        }

        .radio-player {
            display: none;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255, 100, 0, 0.1), rgba(255, 140, 0, 0.1));
            border: 2px solid rgba(255, 140, 0, 0.4);
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 35px;
            margin-top: 30px;
            animation: slideDown 0.5s ease-out;
            backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
        }

        .radio-player.active {
            display: block;
        }

        .player-info {
            text-align: center;
            margin-bottom: 25px;
        }

        .player-info h3 {
            color: #ffaa00;
            font-size: 18px;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
            font-weight: 700;
        }

        .player-info p {
            color: #a0a0b0;
            font-size: 13px;
        }

        .player-controls {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            gap: 15px;
            margin-bottom: 25px;
        }

        .control-btn {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255, 140, 0, 0.3), rgba(255, 100, 0, 0.3));
            border: 1px solid rgba(255, 140, 0, 0.5);
            width: 50px;
            height: 50px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            color: #ffaa00;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 20px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
        }

        .control-btn:hover {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255, 140, 0, 0.5), rgba(255, 100, 0, 0.5));
            box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(255, 140, 0, 0.4);
        }

        .control-btn.play-pause {
            width: 60px;
            height: 60px;
            font-size: 24px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffaa00, #ff8800);
            color: #0a0e27;
            border: none;
        }

        .control-btn.play-pause:hover {
            box-shadow: 0 0 25px rgba(255, 140, 0, 0.6);
        }

        .volume-control {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
            justify-content: center;
        }

        .volume-slider {
            width: 150px;
            height: 6px;
            border-radius: 3px;
            background: rgba(255, 140, 0, 0.2);
            outline: none;
            -webkit-appearance: none;
            appearance: none;
        }

        .volume-slider::-webkit-slider-thumb {
            -webkit-appearance: none;
            appearance: none;
            width: 16px;
            height: 16px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffaa00, #ff8800);
            cursor: pointer;
            box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(255, 140, 0, 0.5);
        }

        .volume-slider::-moz-range-thumb {
            width: 16px;
            height: 16px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffaa00, #ff8800);
            cursor: pointer;
            border: none;
            box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(255, 140, 0, 0.5);
        }

        .status-text {
            color: #ffaa00;
            font-size: 13px;
            font-weight: 700;
            text-align: center;
            margin-top: 15px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 1px;
        }

        .social-section {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(100, 100, 255, 0.08), rgba(150, 100, 255, 0.08));
            border: 2px solid rgba(150, 100, 255, 0.3);
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 50px;
            margin-bottom: 40px;
            text-align: center;
            animation: fadeIn 1.2s ease-out;
            backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .social-section::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            bottom: -50%;
            right: -50%;
            width: 200px;
            height: 200px;
            background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(150, 100, 255, 0.2) 0%, transparent 70%);
            border-radius: 50%;
        }

        .social-section h2 {
            color: #b366ff;
            font-size: 32px;
            margin-bottom: 15px;
            font-weight: 800;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
        }

        .social-section p {
            color: #b0a0c0;
            margin-bottom: 35px;
            font-size: 16px;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
        }

        .social-buttons {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(130px, 1fr));
            gap: 20px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
        }

        .social-btn {
            padding: 18px 20px;
            border-radius: 16px;
            border: none;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-weight: 700;
            font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            font-size: 13px;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
            text-decoration: none;
            color: white;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.5px;
        }

        .social-btn.instagram {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f09433, #e6683c, #dc2743, #cc2366, #bc1888);
            box-shadow: 0 8px 25px rgba(240, 148, 51, 0.3);
        }

        .social-btn.instagram:hover {
            transform: translateY(-5px);
            box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(240, 148, 51, 0.5);
        }

        .social-btn.whatsapp {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #25d366, #20ba5a);
            box-shadow: 0 8px 25px rgba(37, 211, 102, 0.3);
        }

        .social-btn.whatsapp:hover {
            transform: translateY(-5px);
            box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(37, 211, 102, 0.5);
        }

        .social-btn.youtube {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff0000, #cc0000);
            box-shadow: 0 8px 25px rgba(255, 0, 0, 0.3);
        }

        .social-btn.youtube:hover {
            transform: translateY(-5px);
            box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(255, 0, 0, 0.5);
        }

        .social-btn.telegram {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0088cc, #0077b5);
            box-shadow: 0 8px 25px rgba(0, 136, 204, 0.3);
        }

        .social-btn.telegram:hover {
            transform: translateY(-5px);
            box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(0, 136, 204, 0.5);
        }

        .social-btn:active {
            transform: scale(0.95);
        }

        .social-btn-icon {
            font-size: 28px;
        }

        .social-btn-text {
            font-size: 11px;
        }

        .alert {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255, 140, 0, 0.1), rgba(255, 100, 0, 0.08));
            border: 2px solid rgba(255, 140, 0, 0.3);
            padding: 25px;
            border-radius: 16px;
            margin-bottom: 40px;
            text-align: left;
            animation: slideInLeft 0.8s ease-out;
            backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
        }

        .alert b {
            color: #ffaa00;
        }

        .card {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(100, 200, 255, 0.08), rgba(100, 100, 255, 0.08));
            border: 2px solid rgba(100, 200, 255, 0.3);
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 50px;
            backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
            animation: fadeIn 1s ease-out;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .card::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: -50%;
            right: -50%;
            width: 200px;
            height: 200px;
            background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(100, 200, 255, 0.2) 0%, transparent 70%);
            border-radius: 50%;
        }

        .card h2 {
            font-size: 32px;
            margin-bottom: 15px;
            color: #00d4ff;
            font-weight: 800;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
        }

        .card p {
            color: #b0a0c0;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
            font-size: 16px;
        }

        .options {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(250px, 1fr));
            gap: 20px;
            margin-top: 30px;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
        }

        .option {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255, 100, 200, 0.1), rgba(100, 200, 255, 0.1));
            border: 2px solid rgba(100, 200, 255, 0.3);
            border-radius: 16px;
            padding: 35px 25px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            text-align: center;
            backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
        }

        .option:hover {
            border-color: #00d4ff;
            box-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.3);
            transform: translateY(-5px);
        }

        .option h3 {
            font-size: 20px;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            color: #00d4ff;
            font-weight: 700;
        }

        .option span {
            color: #b0a0c0;
            font-size: 14px;
        }

        .back {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(100, 200, 255, 0.2), rgba(100, 100, 255, 0.2));
            border: 2px solid rgba(100, 200, 255, 0.4);
            padding: 12px 30px;
            border-radius: 50px;
            color: #00d4ff;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-weight: 700;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif;
            font-size: 14px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 1px;
        }

        .back:hover {
            background: rgba(100, 200, 255, 0.3);
            box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(100, 200, 255, 0.4);
        }

        .topButtons {
            display: flex;
            gap: 15px;
            justify-content: center;
            margin: 30px 0;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
        }

        .btn {
            padding: 14px 30px;
            border-radius: 50px;
            border: none;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-weight: 700;
            font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            font-size: 14px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 1px;
        }

        .install {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #00d4ff, #0099cc);
            color: #0a0e27;
            box-shadow: 0 8px 25px rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.3);
        }

        .install:hover {
            transform: translateY(-3px);
            box-shadow: 0 12px 35px rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.5);
        }

        .fix {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(100, 200, 255, 0.2), rgba(100, 100, 255, 0.2));
            border: 2px solid rgba(100, 200, 255, 0.4);
            color: #00d4ff;
        }

        .fix:hover {
            background: rgba(100, 200, 255, 0.3);
            box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(100, 200, 255, 0.4);
        }

        .tutorialCard {
            margin-top: 40px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(100, 200, 255, 0.08), rgba(100, 100, 255, 0.08));
            border: 2px solid rgba(100, 200, 255, 0.3);
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 50px;
            backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .tutorialCard::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: -50%;
            left: -50%;
            width: 200px;
            height: 200px;
            background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(100, 200, 255, 0.2) 0%, transparent 70%);
            border-radius: 50%;
        }

        .tutorialCard h2 {
            color: #00d4ff;
            margin-bottom: 15px;
            font-size: 28px;
            font-weight: 800;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
        }

        .tutorialCard p {
            color: #b0a0c0;
            margin-bottom: 25px;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
        }

        .tutorials-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr));
            gap: 20px;
            margin-top: 20px;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
        }

        .tutorial {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255, 100, 200, 0.1), rgba(100, 200, 255, 0.1));
            border: 2px solid rgba(100, 200, 255, 0.3);
            border-radius: 16px;
            padding: 30px;
            text-align: center;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
        }

        .tutorial:hover {
            border-color: #00d4ff;
            box-shadow: 0 0 25px rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.3);
            transform: translateY(-3px);
        }

        .tutorial h3 {
            color: #00d4ff;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
            font-size: 18px;
            font-weight: 700;
        }

        .tutorial p {
            color: #b0a0c0;
            font-size: 14px;
        }

        .tip {
            margin-top: 20px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255, 100, 200, 0.1), rgba(255, 150, 100, 0.1));
            border: 2px solid rgba(255, 100, 200, 0.3);
            padding: 15px;
            border-radius: 12px;
            color: #ff64c8;
            font-size: 14px;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
        }

        .downloadArea {
            display: none;
            margin-top: 30px;
            animation: fadeIn 0.6s ease-out;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
        }

        .downloadArea.active {
            display: block;
        }

        .downloadButtons {
            display: flex;
            gap: 20px;
            justify-content: center;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            margin: 25px 0;
        }

        .downloadBtn {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #00d4ff, #0099cc);
            border: none;
            padding: 16px 35px;
            border-radius: 50px;
            color: #0a0e27;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-weight: 700;
            font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            box-shadow: 0 8px 25px rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.3);
            font-size: 14px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 1px;
            position: relative;
        }

        .downloadBtn:hover {
            transform: translateY(-3px);
            box-shadow: 0 12px 35px rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.5);
        }

        .downloadBtn:active {
            transform: scale(0.95);
        }

        .note {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255, 140, 0, 0.1), rgba(255, 100, 0, 0.08));
            border: 2px solid rgba(255, 140, 0, 0.3);
            padding: 15px;
            border-radius: 12px;
            margin: 20px 0;
            text-align: left;
            color: #ffaa00;
            font-size: 14px;
            backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
        }

        .video {
            margin-top: 30px;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
        }

        .video h2 {
            color: #00d4ff;
            margin-bottom: 15px;
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: 800;
        }

        .video p {
            color: #b0a0c0;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }

        iframe {
            width: 100%;
            height: 450px;
            border-radius: 16px;
            border: 2px solid rgba(100, 200, 255, 0.3);
        }

        .features {
            margin-top: 40px;
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr));
            gap: 20px;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
        }

        .feature {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255, 100, 200, 0.1), rgba(100, 200, 255, 0.1));
            border: 2px solid rgba(100, 200, 255, 0.3);
            padding: 25px;
            border-radius: 16px;
            text-align: center;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
        }

        .feature:hover {
            border-color: #00d4ff;
            box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.2);
            transform: translateY(-3px);
        }

        .feature h3 {
            color: #00d4ff;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            font-size: 16px;
            font-weight: 700;
        }

        .feature p {
            color: #b0a0c0;
            font-size: 13px;
        }

        footer {
            margin-top: 60px;
            color: #7a8a91;
            font-size: 12px;
            text-align: center;
            padding-top: 40px;
            border-top: 2px solid rgba(100, 200, 255, 0.2);
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
        }

        footer a {
            color: #00d4ff;
            text-decoration: none;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
        }

        footer a:hover {
            text-decoration: underline;
        }

        #pagina1 {
            display: block;
            animation: fadeIn 0.6s ease-out;
        }

        #pagina2 {
            display: none;
            animation: fadeIn 0.6s ease-out;
        }

        #pagina2.active {
            display: block;
        }

        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .title {
                font-size: 36px;
            }

            .card {
                padding: 30px 20px;
            }

            .tutorialCard {
                padding: 25px;
            }

            .radio-section {
                padding: 25px;
            }

            .social-section {
                padding: 25px;
            }

            .clock-container {
                padding: 20px;
            }

            .clock-display {
                font-size: 36px;
            }

            iframe {
                height: 300px;
            }

            .options {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }

            .tutorials-grid {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }

            .counter-number {
                font-size: 42px;
            }

            .radio-section h2 {
                font-size: 24px;
            }

            .social-section h2 {
                font-size: 24px;
            }

            .radio-btn {
                padding: 14px 35px;
                font-size: 14px;
            }

            .volume-slider {
                width: 100px;
            }

            .social-buttons {
                grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
            }
        }
    </style>
</head>

<body>
    <div class="container">

        <!-- PÁGINA 1 -->
        <div id="pagina1">
            <div class="logo">ISAC</div>
            <h1 class="title">ISAC MODS TV FREE</h1>
            <p class="subtitle">Versão gratuita com funcionalidades básicas. Suporte limitado.</p>

            <!-- RELÓGIO -->
            <div class="clock-container">
                <div class="clock-title">⏰ HORA ATUAL</div>
                <div class="clock-display" id="clockDisplay">00:00:00</div>
                <div class="clock-date" id="clockDate">Carregando...</div>
            </div>

            <div class="download-counter">
                <h3>📥 DOWNLOADS TOTAIS</h3>
                <div class="counter-number" id="counterNumber">0</div>
                <div class="counter-label">Pessoas já baixaram o Isac Menu</div>
                <div class="counter-bar">
                    <div class="counter-fill"></div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="radio-section">
                <h2>
                    🎙️ NOLTOSFERA RÁDIO
                    <div class="sound-waves" id="soundWaves">
                        <div class="wave"></div>
                        <div class="wave"></div>
                        <div class="wave"></div>
                        <div class="wave"></div>
                        <div class="wave"></div>
                    </div>
                </h2>
                <p>Ouça a melhor música e conteúdo ao vivo. Clique para acessar!</p>
                <button class="radio-btn" id="radioBtn" onclick="toggleRadio()">
                    ▶️ ACESSAR RÁDIO
                </button>

                <div class="radio-player" id="radioPlayer">
                    <div class="player-info">
                        <h3>🎵 Tocando Agora</h3>
                        <p>Noltosfera Rádio - Ao Vivo</p>
                    </div>

                    <div class="player-controls">
                        <button class="control-btn" onclick="previousTrack()">⏮️</button>
                        <button class="control-btn play-pause" id="playPauseBtn" onclick="togglePlayPause()">⏸️</button>
                        <button class="control-btn" onclick="nextTrack()">⏭️</button>
                    </div>

                    <div class="volume-control">
                        <span style="font-size: 18px;">🔊</span>
                        <input type="range" class="volume-slider" id="volumeSlider" min="0" max="100" value="70" onchange="changeVolume(this.value)">
                        <span style="font-size: 18px;">🔉</span>
                    </div>

                    <div class="status-text" id="statusText">
                        ▶️ Reproduzindo...
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="social-section">
                <h2>🌐 SIGA NOSSAS REDES SOCIAIS</h2>
                <p>Fique por dentro de todas as novidades e atualizações!</p>

                <div class="social-buttons">
                    <a href="https://www.instagram.com/bruxomodz" target="_blank" class="social-btn instagram">
                        <div class="social-btn-icon">📷</div>
                        <div class="social-btn-text">Instagram</div>
                    </a>

                    <a href="https://chat.whatsapp.com/Bye9CWnyog5CggS0y6RxXA?mode=gi_t" target="_blank" class="social-btn whatsapp">
                        <div class="social-btn-icon">💬</div>
                        <div class="social-btn-text">WhatsApp</div>
                    </a>

                    <a href="https://www.youtube.com/@isacmodstv" target="_blank" class="social-btn youtube">
                        <div class="social-btn-icon">▶️</div>
                        <div class="social-btn-text">Isac Mods</div>
                    </a>

                    <a href="https://www.youtube.com/@bruxomodzofc" target="_blank" class="social-btn youtube">
                        <div class="social-btn-icon">▶️</div>
                        <div class="social-btn-text">Bruxo Modz</div>
                    </a>

                    <a href="https://t.me/bruxomodz" target="_blank" class="social-btn telegram">
                        <div class="social-btn-icon">✈️</div>
                        <div class="social-btn-text">Telegram</div>
                    </a>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="alert">
                <b>⚠️ AVISO:</b> Esta é a versão gratuita do Isac Menu e pode não funcionar em todos os dispositivos. Para uma versão completa com suporte e compatibilidade garantida, adquira o Isac Menu VIP em nossa loja.
            </div>

            <div class="card">
                <h2>O que você precisa?</h2>
                <p>Selecione uma opção para continuar</p>

                <div class="options">
                    <div class="option" onclick="abrirPagina2()">
                        <h3>📥 Instalar Isac Menu</h3>
                        <span>Download + Tutorial de instalação completo</span>
                    </div>

                    <div class="option">
                        <h3>🔧 Resolver Erros</h3>
                        <span>Resolva erros comuns de forma rápida e fácil</span>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <footer>
                ISAC MODS TV © 2025 - Todos os direitos reservados<br><br>
                Isac Menu FREE - Versão gratuita com recursos limitados<br><br>
                Para suporte técnico e recursos completos, adquira a versão VIP em:<br>
                <a href="https://bruxomodzoficial.github.io/site-downloads/">https://bruxomodzoficial.github.io/site-downloads/</a>
            </footer>
        </div>

        <!-- PÁGINA 2 -->
        <div id="pagina2">
            <div class="logo">ISAC</div>
            <h1 class="title">ISAC MENU FREE</h1>
            <p class="subtitle">Versão gratuita com funcionalidades básicas. Suporte limitado.</p>

            <div class="alert">
                <b>⚠️ AVISO:</b> Esta é a versão gratuita do Isac Menu e pode não funcionar em todos os dispositivos. Para uma versão completa com suporte e compatibilidade garantida, adquira o Isac Menu VIP em nossa loja.
            </div>

            <button class="back" onclick="voltar()">← Voltar à Seleção</button>

            <div class="topButtons">
                <button class="btn install">📥 INSTALAÇÃO</button>
                <button class="btn fix">🔧 RESOLVER ERROS</button>
            </div>

            <div class="tutorialCard">
                <h2>SELECIONE O TUTORIAL DE INSTALAÇÃO</h2>
                <p>Escolha um dos métodos abaixo. Se um não funcionar, tente o outro:</p>

                <div class="tutorials-grid">
                    <div class="tutorial" onclick="abrirTutorial(1)">
                        <h3>🎯 TUTORIAL 1</h3>
                        <p>📥 Instalar Isac Menu Rio Rise</p>
                    </div>

                    <div class="tutorial" onclick="abrirTutorial(2)">
                        <h3>🎯 TUTORIAL 2</h3>
                        <p>📥 Instalar Isac Menu Live Russia</p>
                    </div>

                    <div class="tutorial" onclick="abrirTutorial(3)">
                        <h3>🎯 TUTORIAL 3</h3>
                        <p>📥 Instalar Isac Menu Free Fire</p>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="tip">
                    💡 <b>Dica:</b> Se um tutorial não funcionar no seu dispositivo, é só tentar o outro método. Todos levam ao mesmo resultado!
                </div>

                <div id="downloadArea1" class="downloadArea">
                    <h2 style="color:#00d4ff; margin-top:30px;">📥 DOWNLOAD - TUTORIAL 1 (RIO RISE)</h2>
                    <p>Baixe o arquivo do Isac Menu para o Tutorial 1:</p>

                    <div class="downloadButtons">
                        <button class="downloadBtn" onclick="handleDownload(event, 'https://riorise.com/download/isacmenu')">
                            ⬇️ BAIXAR ISAC MENU
                        </button>
                        <button class="downloadBtn" onclick="handleDownload(event, 'https://riorise.com/pt')">
                            ⬇️ BAIXAR RIO RISE
                        </button>
                    </div>

                    <div class="note">
                        <b>📌 Nota Importante:</b> Caso o navegador bloqueie o download, clique em "Manter arquivo" — ele é 100% seguro e verificado.
                    </div>

                    <div class="video">
                        <h2>🎬 VÍDEO TUTORIAL 1 - RIO RISE</h2>
                        <p>Assista o passo a passo completo para instalar o Isac Menu com Rio Rise:</p>
                        <iframe src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/aK14-gEwsXo"></iframe>
                    </div>

                    <div class="features">
                        <div class="feature">
                            <h3>🛡️ Proteção Básica</h3>
                            <p>Proteção limitada para uso seguro</p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="feature">
                            <h3>⚙️ Funcionalidades Básicas</h3>
                            <p>Recursos limitados da versão gratuita</p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="feature">
                            <h3>📞 Suporte Limitado</h3>
                            <p>Sem suporte técnico direto</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div id="downloadArea2" class="downloadArea">
                    <h2 style="color:#00d4ff; margin-top:30px;">📥 DOWNLOAD - TUTORIAL 2 (LIVE RUSSIA)</h2>
                    <p>Baixe o arquivo do Isac Menu para o Tutorial 2:</p>

                    <div class="downloadButtons">
                        <button class="downloadBtn" onclick="handleDownload(event, 'https://mega.nz/file/QFETkZxY#DJTddUOsodxmQ9ev3xgXHqUiQK9vqpnRhPTK908lZo4')">
                            ⬇️ BAIXAR MOD LIVE RUSSIA
                        </button>
                        <button class="downloadBtn" onclick="handleDownload(event, 'https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.liverussia.game.googleplay')">
                            ⬇️ BAIXAR JOGO LIVE RUSSIA
                        </button>
                    </div>

                    <div class="note">
                        <b>📌 Nota Importante:</b> Este método é otimizado para conexões de alta velocidade. Certifique-se de ter uma boa conexão de internet.
                    </div>

                    <div class="video">
                        <h2>🎬 VÍDEO TUTORIAL 2 - LIVE RUSSIA</h2>
                        <p>Assista o passo a passo completo para instalar o Isac Menu com Live Russia:</p>
                        <iframe src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/H-csPSLcptA"></iframe>
                    </div>

                    <div class="features">
                        <div class="feature">
                            <h3>⚡ Velocidade Ultra</h3>
                            <p>Download e instalação rápida</p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="feature">
                            <h3>🌍 Servidor Global</h3>
                            <p>Acesso de qualquer lugar do mundo</p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="feature">
                            <h3>🔐 Segurança Premium</h3>
                            <p>Proteção avançada contra ameaças</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div id="downloadArea3" class="downloadArea">
                    <h2 style="color:#00d4ff; margin-top:30px;">📥 DOWNLOAD - TUTORIAL 3 (FREE FIRE)</h2>
                    <p>Baixe o arquivo do Isac Menu para o Tutorial 3:</p>

                    <div class="downloadButtons">
                        <button class="downloadBtn" onclick="handleDownload(event, 'https://mega.nz/file/QFETkZxY#DJTddUOsodxmQ9ev3xgXHqUiQK9vqpnRhPTK908lZo4')">
                            ⬇️ BAIXAR ISAC MENU FREE FIRE
                        </button>
                        <button class="downloadBtn" onclick="handleDownload(event, 'https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.dts.freefireth')">
                            ⬇️ BAIXAR FREE FIRE
                        </button>
                    </div>

                    <div class="note">
                        <b>📌 Nota Importante:</b> Este método é otimizado especialmente para Free Fire. Compatível com a maioria dos dispositivos Android.
                    </div>

                    <div class="video">
                        <h2>🎬 VÍDEO TUTORIAL 3 - FREE FIRE</h2>
                        <p>Assista o passo a passo completo para instalar o Isac Menu no Free Fire:</p>
                        <iframe src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/aK14-gEwsXo"></iframe>
                    </div>

                    <div class="features">
                        <div class="feature">
                            <h3>🎮 Otimizado para Free Fire</h3>
                            <p>Funciona perfeitamente no jogo</p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="feature">
                            <h3>⚡ Performance Máxima</h3>
                            <p>Sem lag ou travamentos</p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="feature">
                            <h3>🔒 Seguro e Confiável</h3>
                            <p>Proteção contra banimentos</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
