inherits: false; } @property --tw-duration { syntax: "*"; inherits: false; } @property --tw-ease { syntax: "*"; inherits: false; } @keyframes spin { 100% { transform: rotate(360deg); } } @keyframes pulse { 50% { opacity: 0.5; } } @keyframes fadeoutup { 0% { opacity: 1; transition: transform 0.12s cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1), opacity 0.12s cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1); transform: translateY(0px); } 100% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-100%); } } @keyframes fadeoutdown { 0% { opacity: 1; transition: transform 0.12s cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1), opacity 0.12s cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1); transform: translateY(0px); } 100% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(100%); } } .chatbot body, .chatbot h1, .chatbot h2, .chatbot h3, .chatbot h4, .chatbot p, .chatbot figure, .chatbot blockquote, .chatbot dl, .chatbot dd { margin: 0px; padding: 0px; } .chatbot label { margin: 0px; padding: 0px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; } .chatbot .btn, .chatbot button { font-size: var(--font-size-body-2); line-height: var(--line-height-body-2); font-weight: var(--font-weight-body-2); } .chatbot, .chatbot p, .chatbot li { font-size: var(--font-size-body-2); line-height: var(--line-height-body-2); font-weight: var(--font-weight-body-2); margin: 0px; font-family: "DM Sans", Roboto, sans-serif !important; } .chatbot b, .chatbot strong { font-weight: 700; } .chatbot a, .chatbot a:hover { color: var(--h-fg-brand-default); } .chatbot code:not(.hljs) { background-color: var(--h-bg-danger-disabled); color: var(--h-fg-danger-default); font-weight: 700; padding: var(--h-spacing-4xs) var(--h-spacing-3xs); border-radius: var(--h-border-radius-xs); } .float-btn, .feedback-bubble { font-family: "DM Sans", Roboto, sans-serif !important; } .chatbot-button { background-color: transparent; border: none; box-shadow: none; outline: none; } .chatbot-wrapper { bottom: 0px; display: flex; filter: drop-shadow(rgba(29, 30, 32, 0.16) 0px 0px 12px); flex-direction: column; justify-content: flex-end; overflow: hidden; pointer-events: none; position: fixed; right: 8px; width: 360px; z-index: 999; } .chatbot-wrapper--hidden { pointer-events: none; } .chatbot-wrapper--mobile { overflow: visible; right: 0px; width: 100%; } .chatbot-wrapper--mobile .chatbot { margin-bottom: 0px; } .chatbot-wrapper--mobile .chatbot-footer__input { font-size: 16px; } .chatbot-wrapper__resource-triggers { border-radius: 50%; display: flex; margin-bottom: 8px; margin-left: auto; padding: 4px; pointer-events: auto; width: fit-content; z-index: 999; } .chatbot-wrapper__resource-triggers--hidden { display: none; } .chatbot-wrapper__footer-hint { align-self: center; } .chatbot { background: var(--h-bg-neutral-default); border: 1px solid var(--h-stroke-default); border-radius: var(--h-border-radius-lg); display: flex; flex: 1 1 auto; flex-direction: column; height: min(100px, 100vh); margin-bottom: 8px; pointer-events: auto; position: relative; z-index: 999; } .chatbot .chatbot-header { background: var(--h-bg-neutral-default); border-radius: var(--h-border-radius-lg) var(--h-border-radius-lg) 0 0; display: flex; height: 56px; justify-content: space-between; padding: 8px 16px; } .chatbot .chatbot-header__main { align-items: center; display: flex; justify-content: flex-start; } .chatbot .chatbot-header__image { align-items: center; display: flex; flex-shrink: 0; gap: 16px; justify-content: center; } .chatbot .chatbot-header__text { align-items: center; display: flex; gap: 4px; } .chatbot .chatbot-header__action-button-wrapper { position: relative; } .chatbot .chatbot-header__actions { align-items: center; display: flex; gap: 4px; } .chatbot .chatbot-footer { align-items: flex-end; background: var(--h-bg-neutral-default); border-radius: 0 0 var(--h-border-radius-lg) var(--h-border-radius-lg); display: flex; flex-direction: column; padding: var(--h-spacing-2xs) var(--h-spacing-sm); } .chatbot .chatbot-footer__character-count { align-self: flex-end; } .chatbot .chatbot-footer__input-wrapper { background: var(--h-bg-neutral-elevated); border: 2px solid var(--h-stroke-default); border-radius: var(--h-border-radius-xl); height: 100%; margin-bottom: 8px; padding: 8px 12px; transition: border-color 0.2s ease-in-out; width: 100%; } .chatbot .chatbot-footer__input-wrapper:hover, .chatbot .chatbot-footer__input-wrapper:focus-within { border-color: var(--h-stroke-strong); } .chatbot .chatbot-footer__send-button { border-radius: var(--h-border-radius-full); } .chatbot .chatbot-footer__input { background: var(--h-bg-neutral-elevated); color: var(--h-fg-neutral-default); border: none; font-family: inherit; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.7; max-height: 150px; outline: none; overflow: auto; resize: none; width: 100%; padding: var(--h-spacing-2xs); } .chatbot .chatbot-footer__input-placeholder { color: var(--h-fg-neutral-disabled); font-size: inherit; } .chatbot .chatbot-footer__input-actions-wrapper { align-items: end; display: flex; gap: 8px; justify-content: space-between; margin: 8px 0px 4px; } .chatbot .chatbot-footer__send-wrapper { flex: 0 0 fit-content; } .chatbot .chatbot-footer__files-list { align-items: center; display: flex; flex: 1 1 75%; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 4px; justify-content: flex-start; } .chatbot .chatbot-footer__attached-file { border-radius: 8px; height: 36px; position: relative; width: 36px; } .chatbot .chatbot-footer__attached-file-wrapper { border: 1px solid var(--neutral--100); border-radius: 8px; display: inline-block; height: 36px; position: relative; width: 36px; } .chatbot .chatbot-footer__attached-file-overlay { align-items: center; display: flex; height: 100%; justify-content: center; left: 0px; position: absolute; top: 0px; width: 100%; } .chatbot .chatbot-footer__attached-file--remove-button { background-color: var(--h-bg-neutral-inverse-default); border: 0px; border-radius: 50%; cursor: pointer; display: none; height: 16px; padding: 0px; position: absolute; right: -8px; top: -8px; width: 16px; z-index: 2; } .chatbot .chatbot-footer__attached-file:hover .chatbot-footer__attached-file--remove-button { align-items: center; display: flex; justify-content: center; } .chatbot .chatbot-footer__attached-file--image { border-radius: 8px; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; width: 100%; } .chatbot .conversation-alert { color: var(--h-fg-danger-default); font-size: 10px; } .chatbot *, .chatbot ::before, .chatbot ::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; } .chatbot img, .chatbot picture { max-width: 100%; display: block; } .chatbot input, .chatbot button, .chatbot textarea, .chatbot select { font: inherit; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; border: 0px; background: none; appearance: none; } .chatbot input::-webkit-outer-spin-button, .chatbot input::-webkit-inner-spin-button { appearance: none; margin: 0px; } .chatbot input[type="number"] { } .chatbot input::-webkit-search-decoration, .chatbot input::-webkit-search-cancel-button, .chatbot input::-webkit-search-results-button, .chatbot input::-webkit-search-results-decoration { appearance: none; } .chatbot button { background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer; padding: 0px; } .chatbot textarea { resize: none; overflow: auto; } .chatbot input[type="checkbox"] { margin: 0px; padding: 0px; appearance: none; position: relative; cursor: pointer; transform: translate(0px); } .chatbot a.chatbot__cta-link { display: block; width: 100%; background: var(--h-bg-brand-default); border-radius: var(--h-border-radius-sm); padding: var(--h-spacing-2xs) var(--h-spacing-sm); text-align: center; transition: background 0.2s; font-weight: 700; color: var(--h-fg-brand-inverse-default) !important; text-decoration: none !important; } .chatbot a.chatbot__cta-link:hover { background: var(--h-bg-brand-hover); } .chatbot.chatbot-light pre code.hljs { display: block; overflow-x: auto; padding: 1em; } .chatbot.chatbot-light code.hljs { padding: 3px 5px; } .chatbot.chatbot-light .hljs { color: rgb(56, 58, 66); background: rgb(250, 250, 250); } .chatbot.chatbot-light .hljs-comment, .chatbot.chatbot-light .hljs-quote { color: rgb(160, 161, 167); font-style: italic; } .chatbot.chatbot-light .hljs-doctag, .chatbot.chatbot-light .hljs-keyword, .chatbot.chatbot-light .hljs-formula { color: rgb(166, 38, 164); } .chatbot.chatbot-light .hljs-section, .chatbot.chatbot-light .hljs-name, .chatbot.chatbot-light .hljs-selector-tag, .chatbot.chatbot-light .hljs-deletion, .chatbot.chatbot-light .hljs-subst { color: rgb(228, 86, 73); } .chatbot.chatbot-light .hljs-literal { color: rgb(1, 132, 187); } .chatbot.chatbot-light .hljs-string, .chatbot.chatbot-light .hljs-regexp, .chatbot.chatbot-light .hljs-addition, .chatbot.chatbot-light .hljs-attribute, .chatbot.chatbot-light .hljs-meta .hljs-string { color: rgb(80, 161, 79); } .chatbot.chatbot-light .hljs-attr, .chatbot.chatbot-light .hljs-variable, .chatbot.chatbot-light .hljs-template-variable, .chatbot.chatbot-light .hljs-type, .chatbot.chatbot-light .hljs-selector-class, .chatbot.chatbot-light .hljs-selector-attr, .chatbot.chatbot-light .hljs-selector-pseudo, .chatbot.chatbot-light .hljs-number { color: rgb(152, 104, 1); } .chatbot.chatbot-light .hljs-symbol, .chatbot.chatbot-light .hljs-bullet, .chatbot.chatbot-light .hljs-link, .chatbot.chatbot-light .hljs-meta, .chatbot.chatbot-light .hljs-selector-id, .chatbot.chatbot-light .hljs-title { color: rgb(64, 120, 242); } .chatbot.chatbot-light .hljs-built_in, .chatbot.chatbot-light .hljs-title.class_, .chatbot.chatbot-light .hljs-class .hljs-title { color: rgb(193, 132, 1); } .chatbot.chatbot-light .hljs-emphasis { font-style: italic; } .chatbot.chatbot-light .hljs-strong { font-weight: 700; } .chatbot.chatbot-light .hljs-link { text-decoration: underline; } .chatbot.chatbot-dark pre code.hljs { display: block; overflow-x: auto; padding: 1em; } .chatbot.chatbot-dark code.hljs { padding: 3px 5px; } .chatbot.chatbot-dark .hljs { color: rgb(171, 178, 191); background: rgb(40, 44, 52); } .chatbot.chatbot-dark .hljs-comment, rgb(198, 120, 221); } .chatbot.chatbot-dark .hljs-section, .chatbot.chatbot-dark .hljs-name, .chatbot.chatbot-dark .hljs-selector-tag, .chatbot.chatbot-dark .hljs-deletion, .chatbot.chatbot-dark .hljs-subst { color: rgb(224, 108, 117); } .chatbot.chatbot-dark .hljs-literal { color: rgb(86, 182, 194); } .chatbot.chatbot-dark .hljs-string, .chatbot.chatbot-dark .hljs-regexp, } .rate-btn[data-v-756c828d]:disabled { cursor: not-allowed; opacity: 0.5; } .link[data-v-7a4ec2db] { color: var(--h-fg-brand-default); } .feedback-bubble[data-v-7a4ec2db] { align-items: flex-start; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; } .feedback-bubble__wrapper[data-v-7a4ec2db] { background-color: var(--h-bg-neutral-secondary); border-radius: 8px; padding: 16px; max-width: 100vw; } .feedback-bubble__message[data-v-7a4ec2db] { align-items: center; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: flex-start; width: 100%; } .feedback-bubble__text[data-v-7a4ec2db] { align-items: center; display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: center; gap: 4px; margin-bottom: 8px; text-align: center; } .feedback-bubble__text--secondary[data-v-7a4ec2db] { line-height: var(--line-height-body-1); margin-bottom: var(--h-spacing-xs); text-align: center; } .feedback-bubble__rate[data-v-7a4ec2db] { align-items: center; display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; min-height: 30px; gap: 16px; justify-content: center; margin-top: 8px; } .message-suggestions[data-v-8f1a230f] { margin-top: var(--h-spacing-2xs); } .message-suggestions__header[data-v-8f1a230f] { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: var(--h-spacing-2xs); margin-bottom: var(--h-spacing-2xs); padding: 0 var(--h-spacing-2xs); } .message-suggestions__label[data-v-8f1a230f] { margin: 0px; } .message-suggestions__list[data-v-8f1a230f] { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: var(--h-spacing-3xs); list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; } cid:css-b6724f6f-9201-43bb-9839-8b5c8043e331@mhtml.blink @charset "utf-8"; @layer primevue { *, ::before, ::after { box-sizing: border-box; } .p-connected-overlay { opacity: 0; transform: scaleY(0.8); transition: transform 0.12s cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1), opacity 0.12s cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1); } .p-connected-overlay-visible { opacity: 1; transform: scaleY(1); } .p-connected-overlay-hidden { opacity: 0; transform: scaleY(1); transition: opacity 0.1s linear; } .p-connected-overlay-enter-from { opacity: 0; transform: scaleY(0.8); } .p-connected-overlay-leave-to { opacity: 0; } .p-connected-overlay-enter-active { transition: transform 0.12s cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1), opacity 0.12s cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1); } .p-connected-overlay-leave-active { transition: opacity 0.1s linear; } .p-toggleable-content-enter-from, .p-toggleable-content-leave-to { max-height: 0px; } .p-toggleable-content-enter-to, .p-toggleable-content-leave-from { max-height: 1000px; } .p-toggleable-content-leave-active { overflow: hidden; transition: max-height 0.45s cubic-bezier(0, 1, 0, 1); } .p-toggleable-content-enter-active { overflow: hidden; transition: max-height 1s ease-in-out; } .p-disabled, .p-disabled * { cursor: default; pointer-events: none; user-select: none; } .p-disabled, .p-component:disabled { opacity: var(--p-disabled-opacity); } .pi { font-size: var(--p-icon-size); } .p-icon { width: var(--p-icon-size); height: var(--p-icon-size); } .p-overlay-mask { background: var(--p-mask-background); color: var(--p-mask-color); position: fixed; top: 0px; left: 0px; width: 100%; height: 100%; } .p-overlay-mask-enter { animation: p-overlay-mask-enter-animation var(--p-mask-transition-duration) forwards; } .p-overlay-mask-leave { animation: p-overlay-mask-leave-animation var(--p-mask-transition-duration) forwards; } @keyframes p-overlay-mask-enter-animation { 0% { background: transparent; } 100% { background: var(--p-mask-background); } } @keyframes p-overlay-mask-leave-animation { 0% { background: var(--p-mask-background); } 100% { background: transparent; } } } ------MultipartBoundary--bsw3Kmd5vu0lLsilGOlqeu0HhU1aLbhkUuV5Rvl3g5---- } html, :host { line-height: 1.5; text-size-adjust: 100%; tab-size: 4; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; } body { margin: 0px; line-height: inherit; } hr { height: 0px; color: inherit; border-top-width: 1px; } abbr:where([title]) { text-decoration: underline dotted; } h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6 { font-size: inherit; font-weight: inherit; } a { color: inherit; text-decoration: inherit; } b, strong { font-weight: bolder; } code, kbd, samp, pre { font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Liberation Mono", "Courier New", monospace; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-size: 1em; } small { font-size: 80%; } sub, sup { font-size: 75%; line-height: 0; position: relative; vertical-align: baseline; } sub { bottom: -0.25em; } sup { top: -0.5em; } table { text-indent: 0px; font-weight: inherit; line-height: inherit; letter-spacing: inherit; color: inherit; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; } button, select { text-transform: none; } button, input:where([type="button"]), input:where([type="reset"]), input:where([type="submit"]) { appearance: button; } fieldset { margin: 0px; padding: 0px; } legend { padding: 0px; } ol, ul, menu { list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; } dialog { padding: 0px; } textarea { resize: vertical; } input::placeholder, textarea::placeholder { opacity: 1; color: rgb(156, 163, 175); } button, [role="button"] { cursor: pointer; } :disabled { cursor: default; } img, svg, video, canvas, audio, iframe, embed, object { display: block; vertical-align: middle; } img, video { max-width: 100%; height: auto; } [hidden]:where(:not([hidden="until-found"])) { display: none; } :root { --sidebar-background: 0 0% 98%; --sidebar-foreground: 240 5.3% 26.1%; --sidebar-primary: 240 5.9% 10%; } .\[\&_\[cmdk-group-heading\]\]\:text-muted-foreground [cmdk-group-heading] { color: hsl(var(--muted-foreground)); } .\[\&_\[cmdk-group\]\:not\(\[hidden\]\)_\~\[cmdk-group\]\]\:pt-0 [cmdk-group]:not([hidden]) ~ [cmdk-group] { padding-top: 0px; } .\[\&_\[cmdk-group\]\]\:px-2 [cmdk-group] { padding-left: 0.5rem; padding-right: 0.5rem; } .\[\&_\[cmdk-input\]\]\:h-12 [cmdk-input] { height: 3rem; } .\[\&_\[cmdk-item\]\]\:px-2 [cmdk-item] { padding-left: 0.5rem; padding-right: 0.5rem; } .\[\&_\[cmdk-item\]\]\:py-3 [cmdk-item] { padding-top: 0.75rem; padding-bottom: 0.75rem; } .\[\&_\[cmdk-item\]_svg\]\:h-5 [cmdk-item] svg { height: 1.25rem; } .\[\&_\[cmdk-item\]_svg\]\:w-5 [cmdk-item] svg { width: 1.25rem; } .\[\&_\[data-cmdk-input-wrapper\]_svg\]\:h-5 [data-cmdk-input-wrapper] svg { height: 1.25rem; } .\[\&_\[data-cmdk-input-wrapper\]_svg\]\:w-5 [data-cmdk-input-wrapper] svg { width: 1.25rem; } .\[\&_img\]\:size-full img { width: 100%; height: 100%; } .\[\&_img\]\:object-cover img { object-fit: cover; } .\[\&_p\]\:leading-relaxed p { line-height: 1.625; } .\[\&_svg\:not\(\[class\*\=\'size-\'\]\)\]\:size-3 svg:not([class*="size-"]) { width: 0.75rem; height: 0.75rem; } .\[\&_svg\:not\(\[class\*\=\'size-\'\]\)\]\:size-4 svg:not([class*="size-"]) { width: 1rem; height: 1rem; } .\[\&_svg\:not\(\[class\*\=\'size-\'\]\)\]\:size-6 svg:not([class*="size-"]) { width: 1.5rem; height: 1.5rem; } .\[\&_svg\]\:pointer-events-none svg { pointer-events: none; } .\[\&_svg\]\:size-4 svg { width: 1rem; height: 1rem; } .\[\&_svg\]\:shrink-0 svg { flex-shrink: 0; } .\[\&_tr\:last-child\]\:border-0 tr:last-child { border-width: 0px; } .\[\&_tr\]\:border-b tr { border-bottom-width: 1px; } [data-side="left"][data-collapsible="offcanvas"] .\[\[data-side\=left\]\[data-collapsible\=offcanvas\]_\&\]\:-right-2 { right: -0.5rem; } [data-side="left"][data-state="collapsed"] .\[\[data-side\=left\]\[data-state\=collapsed\]_\&\]\:cursor-e-resize { cursor: e-resize; } [data-side="left"] .\[\[data-side\=left\]_\&\]\:cursor-w-resize { cursor: w-resize; } [data-side="right"][data-collapsible="offcanvas"] .\[\[data-side\=right\]\[data-collapsible\=offcanvas\]_\&\]\:-left-2 { left: -0.5rem; } [data-side="right"][data-state="collapsed"] .\[\[data-side\=right\]\[data-state\=collapsed\]_\&\]\:cursor-w-resize { cursor: w-resize; } [data-side="right"] .\[\[data-side\=right\]_\&\]\:cursor-e-resize { cursor: e-resize; } [data-slot="card-content"] .\[\[data-slot\=card-content\]_\&\]\:bg-transparent { background-color: transparent; } [data-slot="popover-content"] .\[\[data-slot\=popover-content\]_\&\]\:bg-transparent { background-color: transparent; } [data-slot="tooltip-content"] .\[\[data-slot\=tooltip-content\]_\&\]\:bg-background\/20 { background-color: hsl(var(--background) / 0.2); } [data-slot="tooltip-content"] .\[\[data-slot\=tooltip-content\]_\&\]\:text-background { color: hsl(var(--background)); } [data-slot="tooltip-content"] .dark\:\[\[data-slot\=tooltip-content\]_\&\]\:bg-background\/10:is(.dark *) { background-color: hsl(var(--background) / 0.1); } [data-variant="legend"] + .\[\[data-variant\=legend\]\+\&\]\:-mt-1\.5 { margin-top: -0.375rem; } ------MultipartBoundary--bsw3Kmd5vu0lLsilGOlqeu0HhU1aLbhkUuV5Rvl3g5---- Content-Type: text/css Content-Transfer-Encoding: binary Content-Location: cid:css-e0b95525-4cc9-4120-9f7a-43ec6c7fd28d@mhtml.blink @charset "utf-8"; #root[data-edit-mode-enabled="true"] [data-edit-id] { cursor: pointer; outline: rgb(53, 125, 249) dashed 2px; outline-offset: 2px; min-height: 1em; } #root[data-edit-mode-enabled="true"] img[data-edit-id] { outline-offset: -2px; } #root[data-edit-mode-enabled="true"] { cursor: pointer; } #root[data-edit-mode-enabled="true"] [data-edit-id]:hover { background-color: rgba(53, 125, 249, 0.2); outline-color: rgb(53, 125, 249); } @keyframes fadeInTooltip { 0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(5px); } 100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0px); } } #inline-editor-disabled-tooltip { display: none; opacity: 0; position: absolute; background-color: rgb(29, 30, 32); color: white; padding: 4px 8px; border-radius: 8px; z-index: 10001; font-size: 14px; border: 1px solid rgb(59, 61, 74); max-width: 184px; text-align: center; } #inline-editor-disabled-tooltip.tooltip-active { display: block; animation: 0.2s ease-out 0s 1 normal forwards running fadeInTooltip; } ------MultipartBoundary--bsw3Kmd5vu0lLsilGOlqeu0HhU1aLbhkUuV5Rvl3g5------
